title: Fish Ingot
description: Fish Ingot is a wonderful mod that adds tools and equipment to your minecraft world.
body:
# **Fish Ingot**
Fish Ingot is a beatifully crafted, wonderful Minecraft 1.21.1 mod built for the NeoForged mod loader. Prepare to engulf yourself in the mysterious and breathtaking nature of the Fish Ingot mod.
## It adds multiple useful tools such as:
- Fish Sword
- Fish Set Of Tools
- Fish Bombs

And Of Course:
- Fish Set Of Armor

Whom you'll have to find recipes for yourself!
